hero.subtitle: by CardBook Ecosystem
hero.ctaNote: By invitation only · Strictly limited seats

about.body1: The Networking Club is a curated gathering of tech founders, investors, C-level executives, business owners, and ecosystem leaders who believe that the right relationship can unlock the next partnership, investment, client, or market opportunity.
about.body2: As part of the CardBook Ecosystem, we bring together leaders from Israel's Hebrew-speaking, English-speaking, and Russian-speaking business communities, creating a rare environment where different business cultures meet, trusted connections are formed, and opportunities cross borders, industries, and networks.
about.pullQuote: A curated room. A clear programme. Connections that matter.
about.cultureSubtitle: Helping professionals unlock the hidden value of their relationships.

steps.title: 01. Request an Invitation
steps.description: Complete a short registration form on the Connect platform and tell us about yourself, your business, and what opportunities you are looking for.

steps.title: 02. Profile Review
steps.description: To maintain a high-quality environment, all applications are reviewed by the CardBook team. Our goal is to ensure a relevant mix of founders, investors, executives, and business leaders.

steps.title: 03. Confirm Your Attendance
steps.description: Approved guests will receive an invitation with event details, access to Connect, and the opportunity to start building meaningful connections before the event begins.

items.title: Curated Audience
items.desc: Every attendee is carefully reviewed to ensure a high-quality environment of founders, investors, executives, business owners, and ecosystem leaders.

items.title: CardBook Ecosystem Members
items.desc: Verified CardBook members receive priority access and complimentary registration as part of the ecosystem benefits.

items.title: Panthera Bar Experience
items.desc: Enjoy Panthera's premium bar and social atmosphere throughout the evening, with a selection of drinks available for purchase.

items.title: Networking Reception
items.desc: Complimentary finger food and light refreshments will be served throughout the event, creating a comfortable environment for meaningful conversations and new connections.

venue.addressSub: Middle Tower · Adjacent to Sharona Market

items.title: Doors Open & Reception
items.desc: Guest arrival, registration, and activation of digital Connect profiles.

items.title: Official Opening & Vision
items.desc: Keynote by CardBook founders and the Panthera team introducing the platform's networking ecosystem.

items.title: AI-Powered Matchmaking
items.desc: Curated introductions, targeted interactions in Executive Connection Rooms, and live opportunity tracking.

items.title: Open Networking & Spotlights
items.desc: Fluid interactions enhanced by active digital displays and high-energy attendee spotlight sessions.

items.title: Close of Evening
items.desc: Final connections, closing remarks, and farewell.

sponsorship.title: Align your brand with the future of networking.
sponsorship.description: Position your vision directly in front of a strictly curated audience of founders, investors, and C-level executives. Become a cornerstone of The Networking Club experience.

finalCta.headline: Shape the Future of Your Network.
finalCta.subline: Request your place at an evening designed for leaders who connect with purpose.

footer.tagline: We are creating a new culture of networking

sections.title: 1. Information Disclaimer
sections.text: This landing page serves strictly as an informational gateway for The Networking Club event. We do not directly collect, harvest, or store any personal data, analytical profiles, or financial information on this website.

sections.title: 2. External Redirection
sections.text: When you click 'Request Invitation', you are securely redirected to the primary CardBook Ecosystem platform. Any personal data submitted during the vetting or registration process is governed strictly by CardBook's main Privacy Policy and secure data infrastructure.

sections.title: 1. Event Access & Vetting
sections.text: Submission of an invitation request does not guarantee entry. Access to The Networking Club is strictly conditional upon successful profile verification by the CardBook Ecosystem administration to maintain an exclusive professional environment.

sections.title: 2. On-Site Regulations
sections.text: Attendees agree to adhere to the standard code of professional conduct. The organizers reserve the right to revoke access or request an attendee to leave the venue at any point during the evening.
